data.title: Ecovyst to Host First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast on Tuesday, May 5, 2026 at 11:00 a.m. ET
data.description: Wayne, Pennsylvania - On April 20, 2026, Ecovyst Inc. (NYSE: ECVT), a prominent supplier of virgin sulfuric acid, sulfuric acid regeneration services, and ex-situ catalyst activation services, revealed plans for a conference call and audio-only webcast scheduled for May 5. The company specializes in these services and is known for its quality and reliability in the industry. This conference call and webcast offer a platform for stakeholders to gain insights and updates on Ecovyst Inc.'s operations and performance. Stay tuned for more details on this event.

data.title: Polymarket discussing $400M raise at $15B valuation. Follows $2B investment by NYSE parent company.
data.description: Following NYSE parent company Intercontinental Exchange’s $2 billion investment in the prediction market firm, a new round of funding has been secured. The specific amount of this recent round has not been disclosed, but it comes as a significant development in the company's growth trajectory. This recent infusion of capital is expected to further fuel the expansion and innovation efforts of the prediction market firm as it continues to establish itself as a major player in the industry.

data.title: This $17 Billion Deal Creates A Mammoth Building Products Company
data.description: A recent transaction has established the second-largest publicly traded distributor of building products in North America, with a total value of $17 billion. This deal has resulted in the formation of a massive building products company, consolidating its position in the market.

data.title: Eli Lilly Snags $7 Billion Cancer Deal To Rival Gilead, J&J, Others
data.description: On Monday, pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly announced a $7 billion acquisition of the privately held Kelonia Therapeutics. This acquisition is aimed at expanding Eli Lilly's portfolio of cancer treatments. The deal is significant as it positions Eli Lilly to compete with top players in the industry such as Gilead and J&J. This move reflects Eli Lilly's strategic focus on expanding its presence in the competitive cancer treatment market.

data.title: Oil Prices Jump, S&P 500 Falls As U.S.-Iran Jabs Puts Ceasefire In Doubt
data.description: Negotiations between Iran and the U.S. are facing resistance from Iran on three fronts. As a result, oil prices have surged and the S&P 500 has fallen, as the back-and-forth between the two countries raises concerns about the possibility of a ceasefire.

data.title: Quantum threat looms for XRP Ledger; Ripple safeguarding against Bitcoin, Ethereum risks.
data.description: The security of major cryptocurrency networks such as Bitcoin and Ethereum could be in jeopardy due to advances in quantum computing. In order to safeguard the XRP Ledger, Ripple has developed a plan to mitigate potential threats. Ripple's strategy aims to protect the XRP Ledger from quantum computing advancements and ensure the security and integrity of the network. This comes at a critical time as the value of cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum continues to rise, with Bitcoin's market cap currently exceeding $1 trillion and Ethereum's market cap surpassing $400 billion. Ripple's efforts to secure the XRP Ledger are crucial in safeguarding the future of digital assets amidst the evolving landscape of technology and cybersecurity threats.

data.title: Saia Expands Northeast Network with New Terminal in Pennsylvania
data.description: The recent establishment of a new facility has significantly enhanced the service capabilities of the company, fostering its growth throughout the region. This development marks a crucial step for the company in expanding and improving its services. The facility is expected to play a vital role in accommodating the rising demand for the company's offerings and is set to boost overall efficiency. This strategic move underscores the company's commitment to enhancing customer experience and further establishing its presence in the market. This initiative is projected to create numerous job opportunities and is anticipated to positively impact the local economy.

data.title: Bitcoin's on-chain data shows mixed signals as price holds at $75K: ETF inflows strong but futures shorts and spot selling rise.
data.description: During Week 17, Glassnode's analysis highlighted contrasting signals in the Bitcoin market. On one hand, there were notable inflows into Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs), indicating strong investor interest. However, this was accompanied by an increase in shorts in the futures market and mounting selling pressure in the spot market. This mixed data suggests a complex and uncertain outlook for Bitcoin, creating a challenging environment for investors to navigate. For more details, refer to the full report.

data.title: Irene's Website Design Achieves Global Recognition for Corporate Social Responsibility Excellence
data.description: In Worcester, Massachusetts, on April 20, 2026, Irene's Website Design, a company located in the United States, has received acclaim at the International CSR Excellence Awards 2026. This recognition showcases their efforts in developing technology-driven solutions that provide significant advantages for individuals and communities.

data.title: Gyde Acquires Benavest to Expand AI-Powered Brokerage Platform and Accelerate Consumer Health Insurance Growth
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Gyde, an AI-native brokerage platform, has recently acquired Benavest, a top national health insurance agency. Benavest focuses on consumer plans like individual ACA, Medicare, and ICHRA. This move broadens Gyde's broker network and national presence. Benavest is set to become a key partner for ACA and Medicare brokers and agencies aiming to enhance their business through AI-powered resources.

data.title: Media Advisory: Surescripts to Present at the NCPDP Annual Conference, Highlighting Advances in Pharmacy Innovation and Interoperability
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, Surescripts, the top health intelligence network in the United States, is set to showcase developments in pharmacy interoperability, prescription transfer modernization, and health data exchange at the 2026 NCPDP Annual Conference from May 4 to 6, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona. At the event, Surescripts specialists will host various speaking sessions to discuss the increasing utilization of the NCPDP SCRIPT Standard© RxTransfer transaction as a more efficient alternative to manual phone communications.

data.title: Tesla Earnings Need To Show 'Tangible Progress' In Scaling FSD, Morgan Stanley Says
data.description: In order to support its high valuations, Tesla must demonstrate significant advancements in expanding its Full Self-Driving (FSD) software, says Morgan Stanley. Following this analysis, Tesla's shares experienced a decline on Monday. The company is urged to showcase concrete progress in scaling FSD during its upcoming earnings report, as investors closely monitor these developments.

data.title: Launched From Submarines, Trusted by 30 Navies: REMUS Marks 25 Years Beneath the Surface
data.description: In National Harbor, Md., on April 20, 2026, HII (NYSE: HII) commemorated the 25th anniversary of the REMUS unmanned underwater vehicle (UUV) line at the 2026 Navy League Sea-Air-Space Exposition. This milestone highlights 25 years of progress, dependability, and operational flexibility that have positioned REMUS as the premier autonomous underwater vehicle series globally.
